mapper.insert: insert into BSC_INSTITUTIONPROFILE (VC_COMPANY_CODE, VC_PARENT_COMPANY, VC_COMPANY_SNAME, VC_COMPANY_NAME, L_ESTABLISH_DATE, L_COMPANY_TYPE, VC_COUNTRY_NO, L_AREA_NO, D_UPDATETIME, L_FIRST_DATE, L_UPDATE_DATE, VC_COMPANY_EN_NAME, VC_COMPANY_EN_SNAME, C_IS_BRANCH_COMPANY, VC_LEGAL_REPRESENTATIVE, VC_CHAIRMAN, VC_GENERAL_MANAGER, VC_BOARD_SECRETARY, VC_BS_TEL, VC_BS_FAX, VC_BS_EMAIL, VC_BS_AUTH_REPRESENT, VC_SECU_AFF_REPRESENT, VC_SAR_TEL, VC_SAR_FAX, VC_SAR_EMAIL, VC_INST_PROPERTY, L_CURRENCY, EN_REG_CAPITAL, VC_REG_ADDRESS, VC_REG_POSTCODE, VC_ADDRESS, VC_POSTCODE, VC_COMP_TEL, VC_FAX, VC_EMAIL, VC_WEB, VC_SERV_TEL, VC_COMP_EVOLUT, VC_BUS_SCOPE, VC_MAIN_BUS, L_REG_DATE, VC_LICENSE_NO, VC_TAX_REG_NO, VC_LOCAL_TAX_REG_NO, VC_DISCLOSEINFO_WEB, VC_DISCLOSEINFO_NEWSPAPER, L_STATUS, VC_INST_LVL, C_IS_LISTED, EN_AUTH_CAP_STOCK, VC_INST_TYPE, VC_SERV_FAX, L_EMPLOYEES_NO, L_EMPLOYEES_NO_DATE, L_BUS_SCALE, VC_REGION2_NAME, ETL_TIME) values (#{vcCompanyCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcParentCompany,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcCompanySname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcCompanyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lEstablishDate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lCompanyType,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{vcCountryNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lAreaNo,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{dUpdatetime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{lFirstDate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lUpdateDate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{vcCompanyEnName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcCompanyEnSname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cIsBranchCompany,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{vcLegalRepresentative,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcChairman,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcGeneralManager,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcBoardSecretary,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcBsTel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcBsFax,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcBsEmail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcBsAuthRepresent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcSecuAffRepresent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcSarTel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcSarFax,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcSarEmail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcInstProperty,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lCurrency,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enRegCapital,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{vcRegAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcRegPostcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcPostcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcCompTel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcFax,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcEmail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcWeb,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcServTel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcCompEvolut,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcBusScope,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcMainBus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lRegDate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{vcLicenseNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcTaxRegNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcLocalTaxRegNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcDiscloseinfoWeb,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcDiscloseinfoNewspaper,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lStatus,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{vcInstLvl,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{cIsListed,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{enAuthCapStock,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{vcInstType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcServFax,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lEmployeesNo,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lEmployeesNoDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lBusScale,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{vcRegion2Name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{etlTime,jdbcType=DATE})
mapper.select: select VC_COMPANY_CODE, VC_PARENT_COMPANY, VC_COMPANY_SNAME, VC_COMPANY_NAME, L_ESTABLISH_DATE, L_COMPANY_TYPE, VC_COUNTRY_NO, L_AREA_NO, D_UPDATETIME, L_FIRST_DATE, L_UPDATE_DATE, VC_COMPANY_EN_NAME, VC_COMPANY_EN_SNAME, C_IS_BRANCH_COMPANY, VC_LEGAL_REPRESENTATIVE, VC_CHAIRMAN, VC_GENERAL_MANAGER, VC_BOARD_SECRETARY, VC_BS_TEL, VC_BS_FAX, VC_BS_EMAIL, VC_BS_AUTH_REPRESENT, VC_SECU_AFF_REPRESENT, VC_SAR_TEL, VC_SAR_FAX, VC_SAR_EMAIL, VC_INST_PROPERTY, L_CURRENCY, EN_REG_CAPITAL, VC_REG_ADDRESS, VC_REG_POSTCODE, VC_ADDRESS, VC_POSTCODE, VC_COMP_TEL, VC_FAX, VC_EMAIL, VC_WEB, VC_SERV_TEL, VC_COMP_EVOLUT, VC_BUS_SCOPE, VC_MAIN_BUS, L_REG_DATE, VC_LICENSE_NO, VC_TAX_REG_NO, VC_LOCAL_TAX_REG_NO, VC_DISCLOSEINFO_WEB, VC_DISCLOSEINFO_NEWSPAPER, L_STATUS, VC_INST_LVL, C_IS_LISTED, EN_AUTH_CAP_STOCK, VC_INST_TYPE, VC_SERV_FAX, L_EMPLOYEES_NO, L_EMPLOYEES_NO_DATE, L_BUS_SCALE, VC_REGION2_NAME, ETL_TIME from BSC_INSTITUTIONPROFILE
